retrieved_result: Festivals March: St. Patrick's Day on Main Visit Website Location: Old Town Rock Hill Phone: 1-803-802-1678 Contact: Frank Hart This Irish themed street festival features Irish music, dancers, arts & crafts, a large amusement area for the little leprechauns plus plenty of food and beverages. No admission fee.
Decision_Reason: The result describes a St. Patrick's Day festival, not content related to easy DIY room decoration ideas.
